find-the-cause

not available
Inputs
repro notes, traces, and the code under suspicion
Acta
v0.2.0 · generated from structured scenario data · regenerate when inputs change
Authority
Working surface only. Canonical state lives in Markdown/JSON and changes solely after explicit acceptance in chat.

Why does the symptom happen?

Falsifiable hypotheses with probes and observations; judge each and record the diagnosis.

n / mrepro rate
scopeobserved scope
impactblast radius

Where each hypothesis attacks

Each hypothesis attacks one edge of the render path: H1 the event, H2 the cache restore, H3 the filter, H4 the timing between them.

Hypotheses

In review — give every hypothesis a verdict0 of 1 hypotheses judged

H1A falsifiable hypothesis

Predicts

What would be observable if this were the cause.

Probe

The one-variable probe that was actually run.

Observed

What the probe showed.

Evidence

path/file.mjs:1

Diagnosis

The diagnosis must name the validated cause and why the falsified hypotheses are dead — a fix is a separate, later decision.

JavaScript is off, so verdict controls are disabled. Every hypothesis, probe, and observation stays readable above; judge them in chat instead — for example: “H2 validated, H1 and H3 falsified — diagnosis: …”.

Judging here only prepares a candidate. The diagnosis becomes canonical when you confirm the pasted candidate in chat — silence never approves, and no hypothesis is ever auto-eliminated.

Candidate export

Derived live from your working state above. Copy it, paste it in chat, and confirm — this page never updates files by itself.

JavaScript is off, so these copy controls stay disabled. State your decision in chat instead; the agent records it only after your explicit confirmation.

(The candidate appears here while JavaScript runs. Without JavaScript, state your choice in chat instead.)
